name: Pathology Pound Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package (12 oz) frozen blueberries, partially thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. With an adult's help, preheat the oven and mix the pound cake according to package directions.
2. Grease and flour a loaf pan. Pour about half an inch of batter into the pan.
3. Using a spoon, add several dollops and small pools of strawberry jam over the batter.
4. Repeat step 2 until you have covered all the signs of jam with another layer of batter.
5. Bake according to package directions. After removing from the pan, allow to cool for 35-40 minutes.
6. In a mixing bowl, beat whipping cream until stiff peaks form. Add sugar and whip for an additional minute.
7. Using a spoon, gently swirl in 2 tablespoons of strawberry jam into the whipped cream and refrigerate until ready to serve.
8. Place partially thawed blueberries in a Ziploc bag. Seal and lightly pound the berries until squished but not completely mushy.
9. Pour the mashed blueberries into a bowl, add two tablespoons of strawberry jam, and mix well.
10. Slice the cake and arrange on a platter. Place the bloody whipped cream and blueberry mixture beside the platter for guests to use as toppings. Serves 8-10.
